name: Darklandia
startIntroPart1: Oh great syarin, your people see you as one to lead them to glory. You shan't dissapoint them, for it is your duty.
startIntroPart2: Now lead your armies and citizens far and wide across the world of wonder, for your kingdom shall rise above all else! Prevail in this struggle amongst nations!
declaringWar: We shall meet in battle with honor!
attacked: Bold! I shall do my best!
defeated: It seems that.....ours was not to be.
neutralNo: Sorry, but we will have to turn this down.
unique: [+15]% Strength for units fighting in [Friendly Land] <when at war>
[-10]% unhappiness from the number of cities
